# Justified duplications (dry-audit dispositions) for scripts/check-duplication.ps1.
# Format: <16-hex sig hash>  <reason>
# Each hash is sha256[0:16] of an EXACT normalized duplicated block, taken from the
# detector's [sig:...] output. A waiver SELF-EXPIRES when the code changes (the hash
# changes), forcing re-justification instead of rotting open. These are idiomatic
# boilerplate that cannot be meaningfully DRY-ed: per-script settings that must live in
# each script's own scope, required CI steps, and per-function param blocks.

# Required GitHub Actions checkout boilerplate (actions/checkout + runs-on). Cannot be
# DRY-ed into a composite action without the coverage gate having to special-case it.
1c344bf48d54a3ed  workflow checkout boilerplate (readiness-gate.yml vs catalog-sync-check.yml)

# Standard checker bootstrap: Set-StrictMode + $ErrorActionPreference + Import-Module
# repo-root/audit-note-helpers + Resolve-RepoRoot. Set-StrictMode and $ErrorActionPreference
# must be set in each script's OWN scope (a shared function cannot set the caller's strict
# mode), so the bootstrap is intentionally self-contained per checker script.
139c2ed69fa3ac9f  checker bootstrap (StrictMode + module imports + Resolve-RepoRoot)
e439bc1c376f5d04  checker bootstrap (StrictMode + module imports + Resolve-RepoRoot)
9a110f8ffa80d5f7  checker bootstrap (StrictMode + module imports + Resolve-RepoRoot)
13cfd6f468330eae  checker bootstrap (StrictMode + module imports + Resolve-RepoRoot)
675e15163318ced7  checker bootstrap (StrictMode + module imports + Resolve-RepoRoot)
67edbacb095259e9  checker bootstrap (StrictMode + module imports + Resolve-RepoRoot)
bb2038a1bccf8cc2  checker bootstrap (StrictMode + module imports + Resolve-RepoRoot)
6ffaf6941ba3224a  per-script exit-code constants idiom (check-pr-text.ps1 vs check-comment-audit.ps1; ExitOk/ExitViolation/ExitInvocation)
52a6dcce9917f91d  checker bootstrap (check-lint.ps1 vs check-structural-conformance.ps1; both -RequireGitWorkTree)
2b0e08ec095ecd59  checker bootstrap (check-lint.ps1 vs check-structural-conformance.ps1; both -RequireGitWorkTree)
76c64dc0e6ede321  checker bootstrap (check-lint.ps1 vs check-structural-conformance.ps1; both -RequireGitWorkTree)
76f9089c1e223033  checker bootstrap (check-lint.ps1 vs check-structural-conformance.ps1; both -RequireGitWorkTree)
311d2194d0584220  checker bootstrap (check-lint.ps1 vs check-structural-conformance.ps1; both -RequireGitWorkTree)
81dafde48bda0fda  checker bootstrap (check-lint.ps1 vs check-structural-conformance.ps1; both -RequireGitWorkTree)

# Per-function boilerplate in audit-note-helpers.psm1: CmdletBinding + the shared
# (RepoRoot, CommitSha) param block + the Invoke-AuditGit rev-parse pattern, repeated
# across the small git-accessor functions. Param blocks are per-function, not extractable.
1d8d3e053855a8cf  audit-note-helpers per-function param-block / git-runner boilerplate

# Per-checker test scaffolding shared by the two near-twin scan-checker self-tests
# (check-no-panel-artifacts.tests.ps1 vs check-playbook-refs.tests.ps1): the file-scope
# setup header ($repoRoot/$checker/$script:Pass/$script:Fail), the per-file fixture writer
# (New-Item + Set-Content, with divergent commit behavior), and the checker invoker
# (& pwsh -File $checker -RepoRoot $Dir; capture ExitCode + Output). Each references its
# OWN file-scope $checker and fixture dirs, so the helpers are intentionally self-contained
# per test file - the same disposition as the per-script checker-bootstrap waivers above.
9fae694941a8a6b7  per-checker test scaffolding (npa vs playbook-refs self-test)
39c2cc2ace307f0e  per-checker test scaffolding (npa vs playbook-refs self-test)
2ce6ef6e7609a9f7  per-checker test scaffolding (npa vs playbook-refs self-test)

# Parallel staged-mode gate logic between the two sibling pre-commit gates
# (check-comment-audit.ps1 vs check-post-code-change.ps1): the acceptable-parents
# amend-handling (rev-parse HEAD / HEAD^ under PANEL_GATE_AMEND), the staged-receipt
# read (-WorktreeReceipt disk vs `git show :path`), the candidate-parent validation
# loop, and the `if (-not $BaseRef)` invocation guard. These are structural scaffolding
# (parent-resolution, receipt-read, validation loop), NOT the gates' decision logic, which
# stays distinct (Test-AuditFile vs Test-PanelLedger). Extracting them would couple two
# independently-evolving gates for marginal line savings; each gate stays self-contained
# and independently auditable. Same self-contained-per-gate disposition as the
# checker-bootstrap waivers above.
93c72ef430c33728  parallel staged-gate logic (check-comment-audit vs check-post-code-change)
268d2c79c3ba63aa  parallel staged-gate logic (check-comment-audit vs check-post-code-change)
4633aee39592e3cd  parallel staged-gate logic (check-comment-audit vs check-post-code-change)
efad131936ee9af6  parallel staged-gate logic (check-comment-audit vs check-post-code-change)
ee566c7d0f352280  parallel staged-gate logic (check-comment-audit vs check-post-code-change)
